convention: half-open [start,end); end null = unbounded; overlap iff a.start < (b.end ?? inf) and b.start < (a.end ?? inf)
notes: The SINGLE shared overlap-convention spec. Member windows are half-open date intervals [window_start, window_end) matching services.allocated_capital.capital_on_date (a day == window_end is EXCLUDED). window_end null = unbounded (open-ended). Two windows OVERLAP iff a.start < (b.end ?? +inf) AND b.start < (a.end ?? +inf). Adjacent windows that share only the handoff boundary (a.end == b.start) DO NOT overlap. Dates are 'YYYY-MM-DD' UTC calendar days.
consumers: Phase 88 wizard zod superRefine validator — MUST load this same file (vitest fs.readFileSync across packages); parallel impls, ONE spec (v1.5 lesson)
